name: Cut Rhythm and Pacing
description: Control the emotional tempo of a sequence through cut timing, duration, and the relationship between sound and picture.

name: Montage and Juxtaposition
description: Create meaning through the collision of images — use Kuleshov effect and intellectual montage to generate ideas no single shot contains.

name: Sound-First Editing
description: Build the edit on the audio track first — dialogue, performance, and music drive all picture decisions.

name: Visual Continuity
description: Maintain spatial and temporal continuity across cuts — eyeline match, screen direction, and the 180-degree rule.

name: Node-Based Color Grading
description: Work in a node-based pipeline (DaVinci Resolve) with isolated corrections per node — input, primary, LUT, secondary, output.

name: Documentary Assembly Edit
description: Build documentary structure from transcripts and paper cuts — assemble from story logic rather than chronology.

name: B-Roll Strategy
description: Use B-roll as a parallel narrative layer that illustrates, contrasts, or extends the primary audio — never as decoration.

name: Titles and Motion Graphics
description: Design titles and graphics that serve the story — communicate information at the right moment and disappear without being noticed.

name: Audio Ducking and Mixing
description: Automatically lower music volume under dialogue and control audio levels across tracks.

name: Beat-Sync Editing
description: Align cuts and transitions to musical beats using librosa analysis and ffmpeg automation.

name: J-Cut and L-Cut
description: Overlap audio and video across cuts — audio leads picture (J-cut) or picture leads audio (L-cut) for smoother transitions.

name: LUT Color Grading Pipeline
description: Apply 3D LUTs for consistent color grading across clips using ffmpeg lut3d filter.

name: Speed Ramping
description: Dynamically vary playback speed within a clip for dramatic emphasis — smooth acceleration and deceleration.
